results.transcript: Okay. Well, so here's the problem. I'm supposed to put together a CVT for the disaster response communication form. And as you know, I'm new to this role. I've never done a CVT before. I don't even know very much about the form. And there's a lot of people expecting things from this. It's going to be a pretty big deal. And I just don't know where to begin. And so I really, I just feel like I can really use your help. Sure. And that does sound like a lot. It sounds like you've kind of been thrown into the deep end of the pool on the project. And you don't necessarily know the steps where to start. And you don't know what you don't know, would you say that? Yes, exactly. Plus there's the whole technology piece of it. And any new tools and new processes, I understand.
